settings.subtitle: Refined excess. Your scent is the rarest stone, the longest aged spirit, the deliberate quiet of expensive things.

settings.content: You collect. You curate. The only standard is the highest one, and it never has to be explained.
Oud, amber, the smoke of resin you can taste on the air. Fragrance with provenance and patience.

settings.label: Read more
settings.content: The Luxury Hedonist seeks compositions that read as artefact rather than accessory — rare oud, ambergris, leather aged like a vintage, smoke that lingers in the wood. Scents that don't trend. Scents that don't need to.

settings.title: The | Luxury Hedonist's | companions
settings.subtitle: Notes chosen for rarity, depth, and time.

settings.title: Share your scent archetype with your friends!
settings.body: Let your circle find their olfactory match — the discovery is more interesting when it's compared.
